key.name: target-ip
key.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address to ping for connectivity monitoring

key.name: ping-count
key.summary: Number of pings to track in history
key.description: Total number of ping results to keep in the history buffer (10-500)

key.name: ping-interval
key.description: Time between consecutive pings (500, 1000, 2000, 5000, or 10000 ms)

key.name: profile
key.description: Connection type profile: auto, lan, fiber, wifi-local, wifi-internet, adsl

key.name: sound-alerts
key.description: Play system sounds on connection drop/restore

key.name: show-percentage
key.description: Display numeric quality percentage as overlay on the indicator icon

key.name: graph-update-rate
key.description: How often to update graphs: per-ping or interval

key.name: recent-window-size
key.summary: Size of recent ping window for state detection
key.description: Number of most recent pings to consider for drop/restore detection (5-20)
